privileged_info_summary: The task involves linking three real landmark machine learning papers to their official GitHub code repositories in a Zotero library. All three papers are verified to exist: (1) Vaswani et al.'s 'Attention Is All You Need' (arXiv:1706.03762) with official TensorFlow implementation at github.com/tensorflow/tensor2tensor; (2) Devlin et al.'s 'BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding' (arXiv:1810.04805) with official implementation at github.com/google-research/bert; (3) He et al.'s 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition' (arXiv:1512.03385) with official implementation at github.com/KaimingHe/deep-residual-networks. The task data (academic papers) is real, not synthetic. All metadata claims regarding paper titles and repository URLs are accurate.
